Kiera is a college student pursuing an early childhood education degree but has no actual childcare experience. Her transcripts are somewhat garbled and she didn't provide a drive radius. While she's in-market in Augusta, GA and shows interest in education, she lacks the hands-on experience Georgia typically looks for. This is likely a deny unless Erica wants to consider her as a fresh candidate with training potential.
Yes, my name is Kiera. Zaria are currently had mytcc an early childcare and I'm going for my associates degree. I plan to finish off with my bachelor students.

How I dealt with it in childcare compass and childcare is basically just taking deep breaths. If somebody is fighting over toys I would try to see who had it first and if we can't figure that out, then I will redirect them get on a level, talk to them, see what the problem is and then go from there.

I would make a great teacher because I really do care about the kids education. Like I said we are the kids first Educators and it's really important that they're learning the right stuff and taking the right information from the right people.
